Summary: The original PlayStation 5 Disc Edition launched Sony's ninth-generation console with an integrated Ultra HD Blu-ray Disc drive. It introduced an ultra-fast SSD, ray tracing, Tempest 3D AudioTech and the DualSense controller, delivering a significant leap in console performance.

The original PlayStation 5 Digital Edition delivers the same gaming performance as the Disc Edition but without an optical drive. It is designed for players who purchase games and media exclusively through the PlayStation Store.

The PlayStation 5 Slim Disc Edition is a smaller redesign of the original PS5 featuring increased internal storage and a detachable Ultra HD Blu-ray Disc drive. It replaces the original Disc Edition as Sony's standard retail model.

The PlayStation 5 Slim Digital Edition is the all-digital version of Sony's redesigned console. It supports the optional PlayStation Disc Drive accessory, allowing owners to add physical media support later.

The PlayStation 5 Pro is Sony's premium PS5 model featuring a larger GPU, improved ray tracing and PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR). It is designed to deliver enhanced visual fidelity and smoother performance while remaining fully compatible with the PS5 library.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 5 Marvel's Spider-Man 2 Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: Released alongside Marvel's Spider-Man 2, this limited edition PS5 features custom symbiote-inspired console covers and a matching DualSense wireless controller. It is one of the most recognizable themed PS5 bundles.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 5 Digital Edition – 30th Anniversary Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: This limited edition bundle celebrates the 30th anniversary of PlayStation with a retro grey colour scheme inspired by the original PlayStation console. It includes matching accessories and commemorative design details.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 5 Pro – 30th Anniversary Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: The PlayStation 5 Pro 30th Anniversary Limited Edition Bundle commemorates three decades of PlayStation history. It combines the enhanced PS5 Pro hardware with an exclusive retro-inspired finish and matching accessories, making it one of Sony's most collectible modern console releases.

Edition Name: Ghost of Yōtei Gold Limited Edition
Official Name: Sony PlayStation 5 Ghost of Yōtei Gold Limited Edition Bundle
Summary: Released to celebrate Ghost of Yōtei, this limited edition PS5 bundle features exclusive themed console covers and matching accessories inspired by the game's artistic style.
